payload.answer: I can’t save this as a durable preference because the subject and object are unresolved: who “he” refers to, and what “the other one” is.
repair_options: Clarify the person: specify who “he” refers to.
Clarify the preference target: specify what “the other one” refers to.
Provide the full preference in explicit form, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific item/option].”
